prestazioni: Engine swap to a **L15B7** (1.5L DOHC i-VTEC Turbo, 180-200hp stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS** turbocharger, **PRL Motorsports Stage 2 turbo manifold**, and **Hondata KPro V4** standalone ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping. Supporting mods include **Injector Dynamics ID1000** fuel injectors, **Walbro 255LPH** in-tank fuel pump, and a **GReddy Profec B Spec II** boost controller for 22psi peak boost on **E85 blend fuel**.

Full **Tein Flex Z coilovers** with **Honda Airwave-specific spring rates (6kg/mm front, 5kg/mm rear)** and **Cusco Type RS 22mm front / 18mm rear sway bars** for chassis rigidity. Braking upgraded to **Endless CC-RG6** 6-pot front calipers with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Project Mu 999.9 ceramic pads** for fade-resistant stopping power.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2.5-way, 40% lockup) in the **OEM-spec Y10A transmission**, **Spec Stage 3+ clutch** with **chromoly flywheel**, and **N1-spec CV axles** from **K-Tuned** to handle increased torque. Final drive ratio changed to **4.93:1** via **MFactory helical LSD** for quicker acceleration.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB04 Airwave** widebody kit with **custom carbon fiber overfenders** (hand-laid by **Seibon Carbon**) to fit **Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +38** wheels wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 225/40R17** tires. Front lip and rear diffuser from **Tommy Kaira M20** for JDM OEM+ aesthetics.

**Recaro SR-7F Kei** seats (JDM-spec, bolt-in) with **Takata Drift III** 4-point harnesses, **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub**, and **Defi BF Advance** gauges (oil pressure, boost, EGT) mounted in a **custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod**.

**Mugen MF-10 exhaust** (stainless steel, 70mm tip) with **custom 2.5-inch piping** routed through the OEM rear bumper cutout. **Rays Gram Lights 57CR** wheels in **Gunmetallic** with **red anodized hardware** and **custom JDM-spec amber corner lights** (Honda Part #33300-SVA-A01) for a retro touch.
